metadata.description: Alpha distribution channel for Magus — experimental plugins with partial wiring, TODO-gaps, and evolving interfaces. Code lives in MadAppGang/magus; this marketplace is a lean distribution index.

plugins.name: autolinear
plugins.description: Autonomous Linear → Claude Code bridge. Picks Linear issues labeled @autolinear, routes them to agents via tag-to-command mapping, captures proof-of-work artifacts (screenshots, test output, coverage), and drives the issue through Todo → In Progress → In Review → Done with reviewer-comment feedback loops. Alpha: manual /autolinear:run <id> path is end-to-end; autonomous webhook-triggered pickup is wired at the receiver but queue → Claude Code dispatch is a TODO stub.
